# Source: dependencies/packages.toml -- run `make gen-deps` to regenerate.

# manager: pacman | layer: 1 | packages: 11

base-devel  # base meta-package: gcc, make, binutils, etc.
bitwarden-cli  # Bitwarden CLI (`bw`); secret backend for chezmoi templates
chezmoi  # dotfiles manager
curl
git
gnupg  # GnuPG (`gpg` / `gpg-agent`); honors GNUPGHOME from .zshenv
openssh
pinentry  # pinentry frontends (tty/curses) + default wrapper; hard-deps libsecret (library only, no daemon)
sheldon  # shell plugin/source manager
sudo
zsh  # user's login shell
